summary=The presence of feature pairs with perfect or near-perfect correlation alongside their high individual feature ranking suggests a tension between redundancy and genuine importance. summary=Features related to bulk rates and flags exhibit near-constant values with extremely low cardinality, while backward packet length features show substantial class-conditioned structural variation. This suggests a tension between features that may be stable but uninformative and others that vary meaningfully by class.
revision_count=0
last_updated_round=initialization

summary=The Destination Port feature shows strong distributional divergence between classes, with the DDoS class dominated by a single port and zero entropy, contrasting with the BENIGN class's higher entropy and lower dominant ratio. This skew contrasts with the moderate class imbalance and presence of duplicated rows at the partition level, raising questions about representativeness and stability.
revision_count=0
last_updated_round=initialization
